title: Measurement of Lysosomal pH Using LysoSensor Yellow/Blue DND-160
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"am69v","text":"This protocol describes the measurement of lysosomal pH  using the ratiometric dye LysoSensor Yellow/Blue DND-160. The method includes dye incubation, fluorescence measurement, and the use of a pH calibration curve to derive quantitative lysosomal pH values.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"bjm90","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"eek96","text":"·       LysoSensor Yellow/Blue DND-160 (Thermo Fisher Scientific)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"9hbfs","text":"·       1x DPBS","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"9sg2s","text":"·       MES calibration buffers (pH 3.5–7.0)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"1aoe4","text":"·       eBioscience‱ Monensin Solution (1000X) (Thermo Fisher Scientific, Cat# 00-4505-51)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":19,"length":1}],"data":{}},{"key":"d7ert","text":"·       Nigericin sodium salt (Sigma, Cat# SML1779)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"5re8t","text":"·       Microplate reader capable of dual excitation/emission readings","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"emoji","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"guid":"6EC3ABA85C1B11F0ACCE0A58A9FEAC02","name":":tm:"}}}}
steps: LysoSensor Yellow/Blue DND-160 (Thermo Fisher Scientific) 1X DPBS MES calibration buffers (pH 3.5–7.0) eBioscience‱ Monensin Solution (1000X) (Thermo Fisher Scientific, Cat# 00-4505-51) Nigericin sodium salt (Sigma, Cat# SML1779) Microplate reader capable of dual excitation/emission readings
• 20 mM MES• 20 mM NaCl• 110 mM KCl• 1x monensin• 20 μM nigericin

Culture SH-SY5Y cells in complete media. Once cells become 90% confluence, wash cells with 1XDPBS and add serum-depleted DMEM for 72 hours. This is a general protocol for measuring lysosomal pH. It can be applied to a variety of cell types, with or without serum stravation depending on the specific experimental conditions.
Wash cells once or twice with 1x DPBS.
Incubate cells (experimental cells and cells for generating pH calibration curve) with 5 μM LysoSensor Yellow/Blue DND-160 in DMEM for 00:10:00 at 37 °C
Optional: Wash cells once with 1x DPBS.
Generate a calibration curve by equilibrating LysoSensor-loaded cells in MES calibration buffers with pH values ranging from 3.5 to 7.0.
Incubate cells in each buffer for 00:10:00 at 37 °C before measuring fluorescence.
Measure fluorescence using a microplate reader at the following settings: • Excitation at 340 nm → Emission at 440 nm • Excitation at 380 nm → Emission at 540 nm
Calculate the emission ratio (440/540 nm), which correlates with lysosomal pH.
Use the calibration curve to interpolate lysosomal pH from measured emission ratios.
creator: Ali Ghoochani
